chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3900 of 2024 M/s Shazeb Pharmaceuticals Industries Ltd. Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 06.09.2024 Mr. Sundar Lal Lohana for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner has been instructed not to press this petition which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Chief Justice Judge
